name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Rear-camera driving profile update: disables rear OIS/EIS stabilization warping for mounted recording, uses a video-oriented Camera2 request, pins rear exposure to a stable 30 fps range when supported, makes anti-banding explicit, and uses one-shot focus lock when true manual infinity focus is not available. Intended to reduce rear focus hunting, preview wave/jello artifacts, and uneven rear video cadence.
description: Visit Video Logger records driving or travel videos with a composed camera, map, GPS, heading, speed, timestamp, and optional front-camera picture-in-picture overlay. It includes stationary GPS/compass smoothing, camera-aspect-safe recording composition, rear driving camera controls, and a black-screen recording mode for lower distraction and battery use.
